workstreams.label: Grant Ops
workstreams.description: Formal grant direction, proposal authoring, and proposal revision delivery.
workstreams.notes: Selected through the MedAutoGrant domain-agent entry; MAG keeps grant truth and artifact authority.

workstreams.label: Research Foundry
workstreams.description: Formal research work from data governance to manuscript and submission delivery.

workstreams.label: Presentation Foundry
workstreams.description: Formal lecture, report, and defense material delivery.
workstreams.notes: Selected through the RedCube AI domain-agent entry; RCA keeps visual-deliverable truth and export authority.
